reasoning.logical_validity: The revision presents a coherent technical thesis with position sizes adjusted consistently in response to risks; all >10% positions are supported by explicit claims and the allocation aligns with the stated SMA/momentum framework.
reasoning.evidential_support: Each claim includes relevant technical citations (RS60, IDMOM, 200d momentum, SMAs). Minor gaps remain where assertions about price being above/below SMAs are made without explicit current price evidence, and some position rationale mentions JPM metrics without provided citations.
reasoning.alternative_consideration: All three critiques are explicitly addressed with accept/rebut justifications; accepted points led to meaningful sizing and cash changes, and the self-identified concentration risk was partially corrected by trimming COP.
reasoning.causal_alignment: C1 is labeled causal but relies on associational momentum persistence without an explicit mechanism, constituting causal overreach; C2 and C3 are framed as observational/risk and align with L1 association.
